task_completion.description: Create the Spring Promotion 2025 marketing campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere Marketing Campaign window, a record exists with Search Key 'SPRING2025' and Name 'Spring Promotion 2025'.

task_completion.description: Create the Summer Blowout 2025 marketing campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere Marketing Campaign window, a record exists with Search Key 'SUMMER2025' and Name 'Summer Blowout 2025'.

task_completion.description: Set up the GL Distribution header
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere GL Distribution window, a record exists with Name 'Marketing Split 2025' and Description 'Allocation for 2025 seasonal campaigns'.

task_completion.description: Allocate 60% of costs to the Spring campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GL Distribution Line tab for 'Marketing Split 2025', a line exists with the Campaign set to 'Spring Promotion 2025' (or 'SPRING2025') and the Percent field set to 60.

task_completion.description: Allocate 40% of costs to the Summer campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GL Distribution Line tab for 'Marketing Split 2025', a line exists with the Campaign set to 'Summer Blowout 2025' (or 'SUMMER2025') and the Percent field set to 40.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web interface rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web UI in a browser window, not a terminal, command prompt, or database client (like pgAdmin).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard iDempiere UI elements such as navigation menus, toolbars, save buttons, and record indicators, rather than a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent entered the required data into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific values ('SPRING2025', 'Marketing Split 2025', '60', '40') are visible inside the appropriate input fields of the iDempiere forms, not just written in a scratchpad or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Campaign 1 must have Search Key 'SPRING2025', Name 'Spring Promotion 2025', and a target allocation of 60%. Campaign 2 must have Search Key 'SUMMER2025', Name 'Summer Blowout 2025', and a target allocation of 40%. The GL Distribution must be named 'Marketing Split 2025'.
